calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-09-2005 Continued To Nov-14-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-14-2005 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Judge Gerald Ragan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Janet Pond.
David Brillant, Esq. for Plaintiff: Gerda Kircher, present by the property manager: Bruce Sandifer. Defendants: Cynthia Johnson and Scott Corsaire, are present in pro per.
Terms of the settlement are as follows:
- Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment against defendants for restitution and possession of the premises located at 1272 Market St. #316, San Francisco.
- Forfeiture of the rental agreement.
- Defendants to vacate the premises on or before noon of Dec. 2, 2005, and Plaintiff will waived back rent and unlawful detainer damages in the amount of $2,142.74
- Each party waives any claim and generally releases the other from all claims.
- Any personal property left at premises is deemed abandoned and to be disposed of.
- Each side will bear its own costs and attorney fees.
- Parties understand and concur with stipulation stated for the record.
The Court deemed the matter settled, trial date vacated.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-14-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DAVID BRILLIANT FOR PLAINTIFF GERDA KIRCHER
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT CYNTHIA JOHNSON AND SCOTT CORSAIRE

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN. TO PROCEED AS COURT TRIAL.
